steps.title: Identify what both texts observe
steps.content: Both Text 1 and Text 2 describe tropical mountain bird species as having severely restricted geographic ranges, even though they propose different reasons for this restriction.

steps.title: Match the shared observation to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A states that tropical mountain bird species are restricted in where they can live.

Text 1 explicitly says they “tend to be limited in the types of spaces they can call home,” and Text 2 demonstrates this through observation, showing birds “inhabited much smaller geographic areas.” Choices B, C, and D address observation tools, nest construction, and genetic similarity—none of which either text discusses.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
